title: かしわ記念の後に・歌いませんけど

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey runs magnificently, much to the
delight of her excited fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is a special day for another reason—it's her
father's birthday. Copano Rickey wears a huge
smile, having brought excitement to this big
moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black, who came to cheer her on, asks her
to sing a song, but Copano Rickey declines.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next race is the Teio Sho. There, providing
that Hokko Tarumae has recovered, Copano
Rickey hopes to have her rematch.
